text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is utterly<n>flummoxed by her
loss in the Kinko<n>Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Overcome with shock and tears, she<n>fears that
both good fortune and the<n>gods have abandoned
her. She begs<n>me to free her from this nightmare.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her tears don't stop—not even when I<n>tell her our
next goal is the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.
